title: How do assign leads on round robin basis to sales team whenever lead gets submitted via forms. help me with automation
excerpt:
I cant find any recipe for auto assignment of leads to sales team on round robin basis whenever lead gets submitted via forms. 
Support team asked to check here in this portal. Monday community  help me on this

posts.author: ukiri (Umesh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cant find any recipe for auto assignment of leads to sales team on round robin basis whenever lead gets submitted via forms.

Support team asked to check here in this portal. Monday community help me on this

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: There is an app called Round Robin Assignment in the monday marketplace.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ukiri,

You can use the Round Robin Pro app for this.

It integrates with monday.com automation so you can use any simple or complex routing to assign leads. It also supports a Percentage (weighted) based distribution model. Here are a few other features:
Set working days and hours for users

Set active/non-active state for users

Set Timezones for users

Set Absent Status (for example, when a user is out of office or sick, no items will be assigned to that user)

Here is a demo:

You can read more about the app here.
